Hyperscale mainnet readiness

Post-quantum Layer-0 infrastructure, entering final launch checks.

QANTO fuses hybrid PoW + DPoS consensus, DAG-parallel execution, and SAGA AI governance into a launch architecture built for high-frequency settlement, sovereign interoperability, and quantum-resilient security.

Join Waitlist Review Codebase
25M+ TPS target 50ms finality goal Dilithium + Kyber + SPHINCS+ AI-governed coordination

Early access

Request launch updates

Subscribe for product milestones, validator onboarding, and public release notices. Emails are stored through a Cloudflare Pages Function backed by D1.

No spam. Launch-only updates for operators, builders, and ecosystem partners.

Launch state

Coming Soon

Public surface area is intentionally reduced while backend subscription workflows, deployment hardening, and launch observability are finalized.

Consensus stack

Hybrid security model

Permissionless PoW leader election combines with DPoS-driven finality and SAGA runtime coordination for resilient throughput under adversarial conditions.

Interoperability

Layer-0 routing plane

Native cross-chain design targets IBC-style connectivity, high-speed message relay, and sovereign execution domains without sacrificing settlement guarantees.

Technical profile

Built for launch-grade clarity, not placeholder noise.

25M+

Throughput target

50ms

Finality objective

PQC

Signature suite

SAGA

AI governance layer

Rollout path

Operator-ready milestones before public exposure.

01

Protocol hardening

Finalize RPC integrity, config validation, and deterministic build checks across the release pipeline.

02

Consensus optimization

Benchmark DAG execution, hybrid consensus scheduling, and production telemetry before broader rollout.

03

Mainnet activation

Open validator onboarding, ecosystem access, and launch communications once operational criteria are green.

Signal ready for builders, validators, and launch partners.
